title: Decision (v2, multi-agent extension)
description: v2 extension of v1 Decision. Adds agent_context_reviewed (human affirmation of full agent chain review) and synthesis_depth_at_decision (ledger-visible record of depth state at the moment of binding).
$comment: Extends v1 Decision. New fields make multi-agent evidence review explicitly auditable.

agent_context_reviewed.description: Net-new in v2. Human affirmation that the full agent chain and input_provenance_chain for all referenced Observations were reviewed prior to decision. Must be true for Decision to validate. Governance rationale: Invariant 3 (Evidence-First) in multi-agent topologies requires explicit human affirmation of upstream chain review.

synthesis_depth_at_decision.description: Net-new in v2. Maximum synthesis_depth value observed across all Hypotheses referenced by this Decision, captured at the moment of binding. Governance rationale: Invariant 4 (Reconstructability) requires the depth state at decision time be recoverable from the ledger alone.
